description: Recherche globale accessible depuis le header sur toutes les pages gestionnaire. Cmd+K ouvre une command palette permettant de trouver contacts, interventions, contrats, patrimoine (lots/immeubles), conversations et emails. Strategie hybride: FTS (GIN indexes) pour les tables volumineuses, ILIKE pour les petites tables. Single RPC = 1 round-trip DB.

userStories.title: Migration: search_global RPC function
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a PostgreSQL RPC function that searches across all team entities so that the search API has a single optimized DB round-trip.
acceptanceCriteria: RPC function search_global(p_query text, p_team_id uuid) returns TABLE(entity_type text, entity_id uuid, title text, subtitle text, url text, rank real)
Hybrid strategy: FTS (to_tsquery with :* prefix) for interventions, emails, conversation_messages — ILIKE for users, lots, buildings, contracts
Each UNION branch filtered by team_id + deleted_at IS NULL + LIMIT 5
Outer query: ORDER BY rank DESC LIMIT 25
Returns empty set if length(p_query) < 2
SECURITY DEFINER + GRANT EXECUTE TO authenticated
URL computed in SQL: e.g. '/gestionnaire/contacts/details/' || id
Interventions searched on: title, description, reference
Users/contacts searched on: first_name || last_name, email, phone
Lots searched on: reference + joined building name
Buildings searched on: name, street, city
Contracts (leases) searched on: display name via tenant/lot join
Emails searched on: search_vector (existing weighted FTS)
Conversation messages searched on: content (existing FTS index)
Migration applies cleanly: supabase db push --linked
Typecheck passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Migration 20260322200000_add_search_global_rpc.sql: SECURITY DEFINER RPC with hybrid FTS+ILIKE. 7 UNION ALL branches (interventions, contacts, lots, buildings, contracts, emails, conversations). FTS for interventions/emails/messages (existing GIN indexes), ILIKE for contacts/lots/buildings/contracts. Each branch LIMIT 5, outer LIMIT 25. prefix matching via :* tsquery. Min 2 chars. Types regenerated.

userStories.title: API route /api/search/global
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I want a search API endpoint so that the command palette can fetch results with proper auth and validation.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/search/global?q=... returns JSON { results: SearchResult[] }
Auth via getApiAuthContext({ requiredRole: 'gestionnaire' })
Zod validation: q string min 2 chars, max 100 chars
Calls supabase.rpc('search_global', { p_query, p_team_id })
Returns 400 if q too short, 401 if unauthorized
Response typed: { results: { entity_type, entity_id, title, subtitle, url, rank }[] }
Typecheck passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: app/api/search/global/route.ts: GET with Zod validation (min 2, max 100), getApiAuthContext gestionnaire, supabase.rpc('search_global'). Clean 65-line route.

userStories.title: Command palette component + topbar integration
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want a Cmd+K search palette accessible from the header so that I can quickly find any entity from any page.
acceptanceCriteria: components/search/global-search-palette.tsx created as 'use client' component
Uses existing CommandDialog from components/ui/command.tsx
Cmd+K / Ctrl+K keyboard shortcut toggles the palette
Search icon button added in gestionnaire-topbar.tsx (left of notification bell) with Ctrl+K hint text
200ms debounced fetch to /api/search/global
Results grouped by entity type with lucide icons: Building2 (buildings), Home (lots), Users (contacts), Wrench (interventions), FileText (contracts), Mail (emails), MessageSquare (conversations)
Command.Loading spinner during fetch
Command.Empty 'Aucun resultat' when no matches
Each result shows title (bold) + subtitle (muted) on two lines
Palette closes on Escape or click outside
Typecheck passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: components/search/global-search-palette.tsx: 'use client', CommandDialog, Cmd+K shortcut, 200ms debounced fetch, grouped results with color-coded icons per entity type, AbortController for race condition prevention. Integrated in gestionnaire-topbar.tsx left of notification bell with Rechercher label + ⌘K kbd hint.

userStories.title: Result navigation + recent searches
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want clicking a search result to navigate me to the entity detail page, and I want to see my recent searches when opening the palette.
acceptanceCriteria: onSelect: router.push(result.url) + close palette
Last 5 search queries stored in localStorage key 'seido-recent-searches'
Recent searches shown as CommandGroup when palette opens with empty input
Each recent item is clickable and re-runs the search
Clear recents button (X icon) removes all stored searches
Keyboard navigation works (arrow keys + Enter to select)
Typecheck passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Recent searches: localStorage key 'seido-recent-searches', max 5, shown as CommandGroup with Clock icon when input empty. Clear button (X). handleRecentClick re-runs the search. saveRecentSearch deduplicates before prepending. Keyboard nav works via cmdk (arrow keys + Enter).
